summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently with no GitHub mutations. No security-sensitive items were present. The job blocks merge, fix, raise_pr, and instant close paths, so ready PRs stay open for maintainer review; two PRs need explicit maintainer judgment because their own hydrated state shows unresolved proof/check or lifecycle questions.

actions.reason: Keep open as related maintainer-owned draft work; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed or justified.
Maintainer judgment is needed on whether the feature and proof/check state are acceptable to continue; this is not a low-signal or duplicate closeout.
Keep open as an independent focused bug-fix PR awaiting maintainer review; no merge or close action is permitted by this job.
Keep open as related provider cleanup awaiting maintainer review; the merged #89460 context is evidence only and does not make this PR closable.
Maintainer judgment is needed on the cron base-session lifecycle and whether this test-only PR is the desired next step for #89666.

needs_human: #89696 needs maintainer technical/product review because the low-memory guard changes tool-call availability/config, labels still say needs proof, and the full check inventory includes check-dependencies and check-lint failures.
#89721 needs maintainer direction on the cron base-session lifecycle question raised by the author; the PR is test-only while linked #89666 remains an open runtime bug report.
